title: The Davy Back Fight Challenge
description: Luffy transforms the final match into a ridiculous but serious fight, taking on Foxy in front of both crews.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Luffy transforms the final match into a ridiculous but serious fight, taking on Foxy in front of both crews.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Looks more like a dressing room!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: You can dress up however you like.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy!! If you wear this afro,

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Wow! You even talk DIF- Fer- Emily!!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Alright~~~~!! The fight is about to begin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Who died and made usopp the coach...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hell yeah! I'm burning up, bro!!.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Heehee. I think he looks fine.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Alright! All seconds out of the ring

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Hold on! I'm not finished yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: All the action will take place there!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Lastly, there is no time limit!!!

summary: Luffy transforms the final match into a ridiculous but serious fight, taking on Foxy in front of both crews.
